reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
몸에는 큰 삑삑이, 머리엔 작은 삑삑이, 꼬리에는 빠시락까지~~ 공+삑삑+빠스락 좋아하는 강아지한테 최고의 장난감이에요!
9kg 강지인데 작지도 크지도 않고 입에 딱 맞아서 하루종일 물고 다녀요 진짜 하루종일..
던지기 놀이도 하고, 혼자 갖고 놀기도 하고 완전 최애 칭구 생겼어용🤍 디자인도 아기자기하고 아기장난감 같아서 더 귀여워요 ㅜ ㅜ
에코프렌들리 장난감 처음 사봤는데 이렇게나마 지구를 지키는 것 같아서 어쩐지 마음이 더 좋네요,, 더 구매하려구요~~
reviews.content_en: A toy with a big squeaker on the body, a small squeaker on the head, and crinkle material on the tail~~ It's the best toy for a dog who loves balls + squeakers + crinkle sounds! My 9kg pup finds it just the right size - not too small, not too big - and carries it around all day long, literally all day.. We play fetch with it, she plays with it alone, and now it's her absolute best friend 🤍 The design is so cute and toy-like, it's even more adorable ㅜ ㅜ This is my first eco-friendly toy purchase, and it somehow feels good knowing we're helping protect the earth a little bit,, I'm planning to buy more~~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
하루종일 물고 다니는 최애 장난감 등극!
장난감은 사도사도 끝이 없는데 많이 더러워지거나 망가져서 버리는 순간엔 죄책감이 들더라구요
예전부터 리사이클링 제품에 관심이 많았는데 봉봉그린이 딱! 나와주었네요
최근 가장 맘에 드는 업사이클링 제품이에요
보들보들한데 탄탄하기까지 해서 내구성 좋은게 느껴지더라구요
다른 컬러들로 재구매 의사 완전 있습니다 >< !!
reviews.content_en: It's become the ultimate favorite toy that gets carried around all day! There's no end to buying toys, and I always feel guilty when they get too dirty or broken and I have to throw them away. I've been interested in recycling products for a while, and BONGBONG GREEN was exactly what I needed! It's my favorite upcycled product lately. It's soft but also sturdy, so you can really feel the durability. I'm definitely planning to repurchase in other colors >< !!

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content:
던지고 물고 오는 놀이를 넘넘 좋아하는 꼬맹이한테 딱이에요.
장난감 디자인도 넘 귀엽게 생겨서 물고 오는 모습이 제 맘을 심쿵하게 합니당
삑삑이도 2개 들어있고 바스락 소리도 나서 소리로 주의 끌고 미치게 만든 다음 던져주면 진짜 좋아해요~!
페트병 재활용해서 만들었다고 해서 환경에도 작지만 좋은 방향이 될 것 같아서 좋네요!!
reviews.content_en: Perfect for my little pup who absolutely loves the fetch and retrieve game. The toy design is so cute that watching her bring it back makes my heart flutter 💕 It has 2 squeakers inside and makes a crinkle sound, so when I use the sounds to get her attention and throw it, she goes crazy for it~! Since it's made from recycled plastic bottles, it feels good knowing we're making a small positive environmental impact!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
삑삑이도 두개나 들어있고 바스락소리도 나서 강지가 넘 조아해요ㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎ
에코프렌들리 재활용 소재에 안전인증도 받은 소재라 침범벅되도록 가지고 놀아도 걱정 없네용
최애 장난감으로 등극 했습니다~~!~!
reviews.content_en: It has two squeakers and makes a crinkle sound, and my pup loves it sooo much ㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎ It's made from eco-friendly recycled material and has safety certification, so I don't worry even if she plays with it constantly with her teeth. It's become her favorite toy~~!~!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 귀여워요.강아지가 너무 사랑합니다. 구입한지 이주정도 되었는데 벌써 구멍이 날 정도로 이 친구만 가지고 놀고 터그놀이를 하네요. 뭔가 강아지가 좋아하는 뽀실뽀실한 소재인가봐요.
reviews.content_en: It's adorable. My dog absolutely loves it. It's been about two weeks since I got it, and she's already made holes in it from playing with just this toy and doing tug-of-war. It seems like dogs love the soft, plush material.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 택배 풀자마자 뺏겼어요ㅋㅋ 주자마자 신나서 물어뜯고 던지고 물고 돌아다니는데 너무 귀엽네요❤️❤️ㅋㅋㅋ 열심히 갖고 놀다가 옆에 두고 잠들었어요ㅠ 너무 귀엽고 잘갖고 놀아서 만족입니당
reviews.content_en: He snatched it as soon as I opened the package ㅋㅋ Right when I gave it to him, he got excited and started biting, throwing, and carrying it around - it's so cute ❤️❤️ㅋㅋㅋ After playing with it excitedly, he even fell asleep next to it ㅠ I'm so satisfied with how cute it is and how much he loves playing with it

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
던지고 가져오는 놀이할 때 딱이에요!
공 모양 인형이라 공 좋아하는 친구들도 넘 좋아할 것 같우용~~~
입에 물 때 크지 않을까했는데 계속 입에 물고 다니네요!!!
reviews.content_en: Perfect for fetch and retrieve games! Since it's a ball-shaped plush toy, dogs who love balls will definitely love it~~~! I was worried it might be too big for his mouth, but he constantly carries it around in his mouth!!!

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빨라요^^ 강아지가 너무 잘 갖고 놀아요. 삑삑이 안에 내장되어 있는 장난감 좋아하는데~ 좋아하네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast^^ My dog loves playing with it so much. He loves the squeaker toy built inside~~ and he really likes it ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
보들보들 하고 귀여워요
다른애들도 사고싶네요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so soft and cute I want to buy the others too ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content: 울 애기가 넘 좋아해요 귀엽고 튼튼해요!
reviews.content_en: My baby loves it so much! It's cute and durable!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 삑삑이를 금방 빼내서 머리 뒤에 빵꾸가 생겼지만 강아지가 너무 좋아해요🤎
reviews.content_en: He pulled out the squeaker right away and made a hole in the back, but my dog loves it so much 🤎

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 봉봉그린 장난감은 처음 구매해봤는데 디자인도 너무 귀엽고 강아지가 너무너무 좋아해요!😆👍🏻
reviews.content_en: This is my first time buying a BONGBONG GREEN toy, and the design is so adorable and my dog loves it so much! 😆👍🏻

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 삼총사 어쩔 너무 귀여워요. 공인데 인형이기도한 공돌아이에게 아주 획기적인 선물 입니다
reviews.content_en: The trio is so incredibly cute. It's a ball but also a plush toy - such a revolutionary gift for my ball-loving pup!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
저희 집 강아지 생일파티 답례품으로 주문하였습니다.
너무 귀엽고 예뻐서 대만족!!!
reviews.content_en: I ordered this as a party favor for my dog's birthday party. I'm so satisfied because it's super cute and pretty!!!

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빠르고 장난감 퀄리티 좋아요^^ 삑삑이 튼튼해요 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and great toy quality^^ The squeaker is really durable ㅎ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
저희집 애기 생일파티 답례품으로 구매하였습니다
너무 귀엽고 완전 만족합니다ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I purchased this as a party favor for my baby's birthday party. It's so adorable and I'm completely satisfied ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: I****
reviews.content: 디자인 넘 귀여워요😍🩷 잘 갖고 노니까 이제는 애착인형이 됐습니당🐶❤️
reviews.content_en: The design is so cute 😍🩷 Since she plays with it so well, it's now become her comfort toy 🐶❤️

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
저희집 애기 생일파티 답례품으로 준비했습니다
너무 귀여워서 좋았어요
reviews.content_en: I prepared this as a party favor for my baby's birthday party. I loved how cute it was!

reviews.name: 잉****
reviews.content: 장난감은 넘 귀여운데 조금 갖고 놀다가 안 놀아요 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: The toy is super cute but after playing with it a bit, she doesn't play with it anymore ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 토끼, 다람쥐, 너구리 모두 골고루 구매했는데 아이가 넘 좋아해요! 격하게 가지고 놀아서 그런지, 며칠 만에 삑삑이가 고장나서 조금 아쉬웠어요. T_T
reviews.content_en: I bought all three - the bunny, squirrel, and raccoon - and my pup loves them all! Unfortunately, the squeaker stopped working after just a few days because she plays with them so intensely, which was a bit disappointing. T_T

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 봉봉그린 인형들 많이 구매했는데 특히 다람쥐인형을 강아지가 너무 좋아해요 하루종일 물고 다니네요ㅎ
reviews.content_en: I've bought a lot of BONGBONG GREEN plushes and my dog especially loves the squirrel one - she carries it around all day long ㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 인형 너무 좋아해요. 물고씹고한참놀더니 금방 구멍을냈어요. 워낙 극성강아지라어쩔수없죠
reviews.content_en: I love the plush so much. She played with it, chewing and biting for a while, and it got holes pretty quick. But she's such an intense player, so there's no helping it

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
바잇미 장난감 2번째
땅콩라텍스 삑삑이를 너무 잘 가지고 놀아 다람쥐도 기대해요.
reviews.content_en: BITE ME toy, second purchase. She plays with the peanut latex squeaker so well, so I'm looking forward to the squirrel one too.

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
핑크친구부터 뜯어서 줬는데 털뭉치가 엄청 날리네요~
먼지 팡팡 때려서 날린 후 줬는데
세탁을 해서 줘야하나 싶기도 합니다.
아이가 엄청 좋아하긴 해서 기분이 좋네요!
reviews.content_en: I gave her the pink friend first and there's so much fur shedding~~ I even shook out all the dust before giving it to her, but now I'm wondering if I should wash it first. Still, my pup loves it so much, so I'm happy!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 휴.... 공또라이  지난번 곰돌이로 사줬는데 박살내서 또 사줫네요~~
reviews.content_en: Sigh.... My ball-obsessed pup destroyed the teddy bear I got her last time, so I had to buy another one~~

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 잘 가지고 놀아요~ 배송 빠르고 좋습니다! 삑삑이 좋아하는데 진짜 좋아하네용ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: She plays with it really well~ Fast shipping and great! She really loves the squeaker, seriously loves it ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 가지고놀아주다가 물리는줄 알았네 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I thought she got bored with it while playing, but... ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: J****
reviews.content: 무조건 새 장난감이 잴 소듕해,,
reviews.content_en: New toys are always the most exciting...

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 저히 강쥐가 넘 조아해요
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it so much!

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빠르고 여기 장난감을 제일 좋아해서 자주 사주고 있어요~
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and my dog loves toys from here the most, so I buy from here often~

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빠르고 여기 장난감을 제일 좋아해서 자주 사주고 있어요~
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and my pup loves these toys, so I buy them often~

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 하루만에 삑삑이 뿌시고 애착인형이 된듯 얼굴을 베고 잡니다…
reviews.content_en: The squeaker broke in just one day and now it's become a cuddle toy... my dog uses it as a pillow and carries it around 😢

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
소형견은 삑삑하기는힘듬ㅜㅜ 꼬리만 물고댕기고 던지고
바스락거리는 소리에 흥미는 가짐
삑삑하고싶어서 요리조리 물고댕기는게 귀여움
reviews.content_en: Small dogs have a hard time squeezing it ㅜㅜ They just grab it by the tail and shake it around. They do seem interested in the crinkly sound though. It's so cute how they try to squeeze it to get the squeaker to work 😊

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content: ㅎㅎㅎㅎ얼굴 좀 보세요 다람쥐 몸도 귀여운데 표정이 넘 사랑스러움
reviews.content_en: haha just look at that face! The squirrel body is adorable too but the expression is just so lovable 💕

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 재밌게 갖고 놀아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My dog has fun playing with it haha

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
한꺼번에 3개를 다 보여줘서 그런지 낯설어 하네요 ㅎㅎ
쇼파에서 자는데 토끼인형을 스윽 안겨줬더니 가만히 있네요~
reviews.content_en: Since I showed all 3 toys at once, my dog seems hesitant about them haha But when I gave them the bunny toy to snuggle while sleeping on the couch, they just quietly held it~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워가지고 놀아줄 겸 구매했는데 찬밥 신세예요.. 공이 싫은가 봐요 노즈워크를 훨씬 더 재미있게 쓰고 있어요 언젠간 관심을 가지겠죠..
reviews.content_en: It's so cute that I bought it to play with my dog, but it's gotten the cold shoulder... I guess my dog doesn't like balls. They're having way more fun with the sniff toy. Maybe they'll get interested eventually...

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 저희 강아지랑 친한 강아지친구들한테 선물해줬는데 너무 잘 가지고 논다고 하네요ㅎㅎ 던지고 물고 오기 좋은 사이즈고 삑삑이 장난감 좋아하는 아이들은 너무 좋아할 것 같아요♥️
reviews.content_en: I gave it to my dog and their dog friends and they said they love playing with it haha It's a great size for throwing and catching, and dogs that like squeaky toys will absolutely love it! ♥️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 장난감또라이를 대만족 시켜주네요
reviews.content_en: Really satisfying for my toy-obsessed pup!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 배송빠르고 잘놀아요 만족해요
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and my dog plays with it well. I'm satisfied!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 역시나 신상을 좋아합니다 ㅋ
reviews.content_en: My pup loves new toys as always ㅋ

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 강아지가 제일 좋아하는 장난감 꼬매고 꼬매도 다 뜯어져서 새로 구매했어요
reviews.content_en: My dog's favorite toy kept getting torn up no matter how many times I fixed it, so I bought a new one

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 잘 가지고 놀아요. 다람쥐 배쪽에도 삑삑이 소리가 나요.
reviews.content_en: My dog plays with it well. The squirrel also has a squeaker sound on the belly.

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 천으로 되어있는? 공같은거 좋아해서 애들한테 딱이예요!
reviews.content_en: My dog loves the cloth-like ball thing, so it's perfect for the kids!

reviews.name: 함****
reviews.content:
아직 사용해 본건 아니고 댕댕이가 삑삑이를
좋아해서 여유분으로 구매했어요~
reviews.content_en: Haven't used it yet, but since my pup loves squeakers, I picked up an extra one~

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content: 너무 약해서 금방 떨어졌어요
reviews.content_en: It's too flimsy and came apart right away
